AppDesc.message: Save Images to Google Photos with right click

LoginExplanation.message:
We do not get access to your Google username or password.

The app only receives a token from Google so we can put photos into your Google Photos.

The token is stored in browser and never sent to us.

LoginPrompt.message: You need to log in into Google Photos to upload photos. Click on the login button to begin.

LoginSuccessful.message: You have successfully logged in! You can now save photos to Google Photos.

Popup_Instruction.message: Just right click on any image and choose "Save to Google Photos"

SaveFailed.message: There was a problem saving image to Google Photos
